artPrompt: A worried human cleric in an ashen wimple clutching a candle to her chest, wide anxious eyes scanning the blood-dark sky for omens, a cold gold halo trembling behind her, drifting ash and guttering flames around her, the clock tower a hazy menace beyond, her tender fearful face the heart of the frame, rendered as soft pastel impressionism — hazy diffuse light, visible chalky texture, gentle gradients, dreamy muted color.
name: Sister of Perpetual Anxiety
text:
Lifelink
Doomscroll (At the beginning of your upkeep, look at the top card of your library and feel vaguely worse. You may put it into your graveyard; if you do, put a doom counter on the Doomsday Clock and draw a card.)
Whenever a doom counter is put on the Doomsday Clock, you gain 1 life. Her dread is, somehow, nourishing.
flavorText: She has read every omen, twice, and bookmarked the worst ones.
